target_repo.description: Absolute target repository path, or '.' for the Council Loop project directory.

security.description: Model for the Security agent. Optional; defaults to 'sonnet' when omitted.

dynamic_agents.description: Policy for temporary per-cycle specialist agents. Optional; defaults to {enabled: true, max_parallel: 4, timeout_minutes: 10} when omitted.

brain_events.description: Best-effort Brain event emission after a driver run. Optional; defaults to {enabled: true, url: 'http://127.0.0.1:8765'} when omitted.

dry_run.description: When true, the council plans/reviews but must not modify, stage, commit, push, or open PRs.

open_pr.description: When true, accepted auto-commit cycles print a PR-ready handoff summary. Hosted PR creation requires an external wrapper or user action.

transcripts.description: When true, each cycle writes a readable transcript under .council/state/transcripts/.

test_commands.description: Optional explicit verification commands for the target repo. Empty means auto-discover.

modelName.description: Claude Code model alias or explicit model slug.
